ddls:
CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "dev_bug_reports" TEXT /* Status of development bug reports and feature requests */,
  "setup_admin_ui" TEXT /* Setup and admin UI rating */,
  "ui_end_user" TEXT /* End-user UI rating */,
  "stability" TEXT /* Stability rating */,
  "feature_set_power" TEXT /* Feature set and power rating */,
  "feature_icon" TEXT /* General icon for the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "feature_status" TEXT /* Status of the feature */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, contributor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update date of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_gallery" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Whether the file is locked for editing */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path for the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Access count of the file */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last access date of the file */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the file */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_gallery_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the file */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for the file version */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Access count of the file version */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last access date of the file version */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the file version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES file_gallery ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calendar_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., public, private, group) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the event */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Whether the event is private */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "recurrence" TEXT /* Recurrence information for the event */,
  "attendee_limit" INTEGER /* Attendee limit for the event */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if registration is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calendar_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., accepted, declined, tentative) */,
  "rsvp_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee responded to the event */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered for the event */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Registration status (e.g., pending, confirmed, waitlisted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES calendar_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trackers" (
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracker */,
  "tracker_name" TEXT /* Name of the tracker */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tracker */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the tracker */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the tracker was created */,
  "tracker_type" TEXT /* Category of the tracker */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the tracker is public or private */,
  "access_count" INTEGER /* Access count of the tracker */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Last access date of the tracker */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the tracker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trackers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracker_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracker item */,
  "tracker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tracker */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_status" TEXT /* Status of the item (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the item */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the item was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the item was last updated */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the item */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the item */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time required to complete the item */,
  "actual_time" TEXT /* Actual time taken to complete the item */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracker_items_tracker_id FOREIGN KEY ("tracker_id") REFERENCES trackers ("tracker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracker_items_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracker_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tracker item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is internal */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracker_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES tracker_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracker_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wiki page */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_content" TEXT /* Content of the page */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the page */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the page was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the page was last updated */,
  "page_status" TEXT /* Status of the page */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the page has received */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the page is public or private */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_pages_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wiki page */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the page */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the version */,
  "is_major_change" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the change is a major one */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the history record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_history_versioned_by FOREIGN KEY ("versioned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_history_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES wiki_pages ("page_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wiki page */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attached file */,
  "attachment_date" TEXT /* Date the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attachment */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the attachment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_attachments_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES wiki_pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_attachments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES file_gallery ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wiki_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wiki page */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is internal */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_comments_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES wiki_pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wiki_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location (e.g., city, country) from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device type used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "preference_group" TEXT /* Category of the preference */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the preference is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of the notification (e.g., event reminder, new comment) */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  "dismissed_by_user" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has dismissed the notification */,
  "dismissed_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was dismissed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feature_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who rated the feature */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "rating_comment" TEXT /* Comment with the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feature_ratings_feature_id FOREIGN KEY ("feature_id") REFERENCES features ("feature_id")
)
